text: Who We Are

Studex Meat is South Africa's premium farm-to-table online butchery — sourcing heritage and luxury breeds directly from verified farms and delivering premium halal meat directly to homes and businesses across the country.
Our difference: full provenance transparency. Every cut shows the farm, the animal age, and the slaughter date. Customers know exactly what they're buying.
Our Products
Wagyu Biltong Gold
Premium grade A5 Wagyu beef, dry-aged and slow-cured in the traditional South African biltong style. Heritage Japanese breed meets South African craft.
Ankole Cattle — Coming Soon

The Ankole breed — drought-resistant, native to East and Southern Africa — produces intensely flavoured, lean beef from cattle raised on natural savannah. Studex is working to bring Ankole beef to market as a premium product category.
Our Farm Network
Our Delivery Partners
We work with a vetted network of specialist food delivery providers to ensure your meat arrives fresh and on time.
Why Customers Choose Studex Meat
100% Halal certified — every product, every supplier
Farm provenance on every product page
Same-day delivery available in Gauteng
Dry-aged and premium cuts not available in retail stores
Direct farm relationships — no middlemen markup
Online ordering with real-time delivery scheduling
Business Model
Studex Meat operates a vertically integrated farm-to-door model:
Customer places order at studexmeat.com
Order routed to Charlie (AI orchestrator) and assigned to delivery team
Product sourced from Moutloe Farm or our supplier network
Packed and dispatched via Dinkoko or My Courier
Client receives live tracking updates via WhatsApp
Post-delivery review request sent automatically
The Opportunity

South Africa's premium meat e-commerce market is growing rapidly as consumers seek quality, transparency, and convenience. Studex Meat is positioned to be the leading online specialist for heritage and luxury breeds in Southern Africa.
Market tailwinds: rising middle class demand for premium food, farm-to-table transparency trends, and the shift to online grocery accelerated by convenience culture.
